bug.description: F1AP interface handling error between CU and DU causing message loss or corruption

prompt:
There is a F1AP interface handling error between CU and DU causing message loss or corruption downstream of function dft1920 in the openair1/PHY/TOOLS subsystem.
The function is located at openair1/PHY/TOOLS/oai_dfts_neon.c:6315.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
